examples: Our seemingly unassailable lead in speciality manufacturing has dwindled.
Its concepts are woolly and untestable, yet are regarded as unassailable axioms.
Their ten-point lead puts the team in an almost unassailable position.
And given how large that permanent war chest is, he can target companies previously thought unassailable.
Instead, they should simply acknowledge that people with integrity, people with unassailable good character, exist.
